sentences.en: You guys don't have the lobster bibs no more? Sorry, hon. Oh, my God. Another plate?

sentences.en: Are you out of your mind? Huh? It says so you can eat, right? So you fucking eat. Yeah, I know, but still. You are really going at it, man. Mm-hmm.
sentences.ko: 너 미쳤어? 뭐? 먹으라고 적혀 있잖아? 그러니까 먹어. 응, 알지만 그래도. 너 정말 열심히 먹고 있네. 음.

sentences.en: Woo! Let me ask you this question. Have you ever considered how much time you've wasted in your life urinating? Hundreds of hours. Fucking right. I mean, you could be learning something in that time, you know? Mm-hmm.
sentences.ko: 우와! 이 질문 해볼게. 너 인생에서 소변 보느라 얼마나 많은 시간을 낭비했는지 생각해본 적 있어? 수백 시간. 맞아. 그 시간에 뭔가 배울 수 있었잖아, 알지? 음.

sentences.en: You know, there's going to be a big change in your life. Yeah. I mean, you could be learning something in that time, you know? Mm-hmm. You know, there's going to be a big change in your life. Yeah.

sentences.en: You know, there's going to be a big change in your life. Yeah. I mean, you could be learning something in that time, you know? Mm-hmm. You know, there's going to be a billionaire motherfucker who's going to create a car that runs on piss. Yeah.

sentences.en: You know what? No more time wasted. Now that idiotic brain of yours has finally landed. He's driving across the country. He's landed on something. Yeah. He's drinking water and Gatorades and shit, fucking coffees and shit.
sentences.ko: 알겠어? 더 이상 시간 낭비는 없어. 너의 그 멍청한 두뇌가 드디어 착륙했어. 그는 전국을 여행 중이야. 뭔가를 발견했어. 응. 그는 물과 게토레이, 커피 같은 걸 마시고 있어.

sentences.en: Yeah. The whole fucking trip. You pull over, take the dick out, put it in that little hole with a gas stove, and fill that motherfucker up. You're on your merry way. The P.S. That's what it's fucking called.

sentences.en: The P.S. Fantastic. Fantastic. You know another good idea? Mm-hmm. Me getting up and getting another plate.
sentences.ko: P.S. 환상적이야. 환상적이야. 또 좋은 아이디어가 있어? 음. 내가 일어나서 또 한 접시 가져오는 거야.
